title: APPROCCIO PARTECIPATIVO PER UN SUPPORTO MIGLIORE AGLI ALLEVATORI SULLA BIOSICUREZZA
description: A guide presenting a participatory approach to support livestock farmers in implementing biosecurity measures through moderated group meetings and a three-phase process of diagnosis, follow-up, and evaluation. It outlines the structure, facilitation techniques, and benefits of peer discussions led by veterinarians and consultants to encourage behavior change and improve on-farm biosecurity compliance.
